files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: '1.22.x'
+          go-version: '1.24.x'
           check-latest: true
 
       - name: Install system dependencies (audio)

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          go-version: "1.24.x"
           check-latest: true
 
       - name: Build universal macOS binary
@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          go-version: "1.24.x"
           check-latest: true
 
       - name: Install system dependencies (audio)
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
-          go-version: "1.22.x"
+          go-version: "1.24.x"
           check-latest: true
 
       - name: Build windows amd64 binary

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ Go toolchain:
 ```bash
 go install ./cmd/sag
 ```
-Requires Go 1.22+.
+Requires Go 1.24+.
 
 ## Configuration
 - `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` (required)

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 CLI that mirrors macOS `say` but uses ElevenLabs for synthesis. Defaults to streaming directly to speakers and can also write audio files.
 
 ## Runtime & deps
-- Go 1.22+
+- Go 1.24+
 - Playback uses built-in Go audio (go-mp3 + oto) and should work on macOS/Linux/Windows with a default output device.
 - Auth via `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` (or `--api-key` flag).

@@ -5,12 +5,12 @@ go 1.24.0
 require (
 	github.com/ebitengine/oto/v3 v3.4.0
 	github.com/hajimehoshi/go-mp3 v0.3.4
-	github.com/spf13/cobra v1.8.0
+	github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
 )
 
 require (
-	github.com/ebitengine/purego v0.9.0 // indirect
+	github.com/ebitengine/purego v0.9.1 // indirect
 	github.com/inconshreveable/mousetrap v1.1.0 // indirect
-	github.com/spf13/pflag v1.0.5 // indirect
-	golang.org/x/sys v0.36.0 // indirect
+	github.com/spf13/pflag v1.0.10 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/sys v0.40.0 // indirect
 )
